pack::A curated collection of 196 health: En kuratert samling av 196 sunne og deilige oppskrifter fra Fredheim.
step::Have all ingredients without oil i: Ha alle ingrediensene uten olje i blenderen, og begynn å mikse på lav hastighet.
step::Once the ingredients start to comb: Når ingrediensene begynner å blandes, hell oljen sakte inn mens du fortsetter å blande. Det er viktig å helle sakte (litt om gangen slik at aiolien får tid til å emulgere (tykne).
step::Once all the oil has been added, i: Når all oljen er tilsatt, øk hastigheten litt i 5–10 sekunder til du får en jevn og tykk konsistens.
step::Taste the aioli and adjust with mo: Smak til aiolien og juster med mer sitronsaft, salt eller sennep om ønskelig.
step::Ground the almonds, but not comple: Mal mandlene, men ikke helt fine.
step::Sautéé the onion in the water and: Stek løken i vann og olje i omtrent 5 minutter til den er myk. Tilsett salt.
step::Add herbs and both paprika powders: Tilsett urter og både paprikapulver og cayennepepper. Stek i 1 eller 2 minutter.
step::Mix well and let it cool down befo: Bland godt og la det avkjøles før det settes i kjøleskapet.
step::Blend all the ingredients in a hig: Bland alle ingrediensene i en høyhastighetsblender til en jevn masse.
step::Bring the mixture to boil in a pot: Kok opp blandingen i en kjele og la den koke under omrøring i minst 3–5 minutter.
step::Pour into molds and let cool down: Hell i former og la avkjøles før du setter i kjøleskapet.
step::Mix together the oat flour, baking: Bland havremel, bakepulver, sukrin, salt, vanilje og kanel i en middels stor bolle. Bruk en visp til å løse opp eventuelle melklumper og fordel bakepulver og salt.
step::Add the soy milk and lemon juice a: Tilsett soyamelk og sitronsaft og bland forsiktig til alt melet er blandet inn. Røren vil være TYKK og litt klumpete.
step::Let the batter rest for at least 5: La røren hvile i minst 5 minutter mens du varmer en stekepanne eller den største kasserollen på middels varme (nummer 4 på komfyren). Det er en rett som kokes sakte med lokket.
step::Turn the heat down to number 3 and: Skru ned varmen til nivå 3 og smør pannen lett med kokosolje. Fordel deretter omtrent 1/3 kopp av røren i pannen. Bruk en liten øse for å få store porsjoner og fordel røren utover. Sett lokket på pannen for å få fortgang i stekeprosessen.
step::Cook the pancakes until the edges: Stek pannekakene til kantene ser tørre, faste og gyllenbrune ut og det dukker opp bobler, snu dem deretter og stek i ytterligere 30–90 sekunder til de er luftige og brune på begge sider.
step::Repeat the same with the remaining: Gjenta det samme med resten av pannekakerøren.
step::Mix all the ingredients together i: Bland alle ingrediensene sammen i en bolle og tilsett deretter melken. Ha det over i en ildfast form. La det stå i kjøleskapet over natten.
step::Bake at 170 degrees for 30 minutes: Stek på 170 grader i 30 minutter. Server varm og dryss valnøtter over.
step::Press out the liquid from the tofu: Press ut væsken fra tofuen, skjær den i terninger og la den marinere i soyasausen.
step::Cook the noodles as described on t: Kok nudlene som beskrevet på pakken. Skyll dem i en slurk under kaldt vann rett etter at de er ferdigkokt for å avkjøle dem og redusere sjansen for at de klistrer seg sammen.
step::Roast the sesame seeds; Heat a pan: Rist sesamfrøene; Varm en panne, tilsett sesamfrøene, rør frøene kontinuerlig med en tresleiv, stek til de er lett puffet og dufter (2–5 min), og ha deretter frøene over på en kald tallerken/brett for å stoppe kokingen.
step::Use the heated pan to roast the to: Bruk den varme pannen til å steke tofuterningene med litt olivenolje, til de er gyllenbrune og sprø (8–10 min).
step::Make a dressing with the lime juic: Lag en dressing med limesaft, sesamolje, honning, ingefær, hvitløk, cayennepepper og soyasausen som tofuen marinerte i.
step::Serve the whole salad roomtemperat: Server hele salaten romtemperatur eller med kalde grønnsaker blandet med varm tofu.
step::Blend all ingredients in a food pr: Bland alle ingrediensene i en foodprosessor til en jevn masse.
step::In a high speed blender or food pr: Ha skrelt og moden avokado i en høyhastighetsblender eller foodprosessor.
step::Add almond milk, lemon juice, garl: Tilsett mandelmelk, sitronsaft, hvitløk, salt og cayennepepper.
step::Blend on medium speed until smooth: Bland på middels hastighet til en jevn masse.
step::Roast the eggplant; cut the eggpla: Stek auberginen; del den i to. Legg dem på bakepapir med den flate siden ned. Stikk hull i skallet med en gaffel. Ha dem i ovnen på 190 grader i 45 minutter. Fjern deretter skallet.
step::Blend all ingredients (without the: Bland alle ingrediensene (uten løken) sammen i en blender til en jevn masse.
step::Peel and cut all the roots into ve: Skrell og skjær alle røttene i båter.
step::Cover the root vedges with the oil: Dekk rotgrønnsakene med olje og krydder. Krydre rødbetene alene, slik at ikke alle røttene blir rosa.
step::Spread the seasoned roots in a sin: Fordel de krydrede røttene i et enkelt lag på en stekeplate. La rødbetene hvile alene.
Stek på 180–190 grader i 15 minutter. Snu dem deretter og fortsett å steke til de er gjennomstekt (myke inni) og gyllenbrune utenpå.
step::Rince the sweet potato in cold wat: Skyll søtpotetene i kaldt vann og legg dem i kaldt vann i minst 30 minutter. (fjerner stivelse -> gir et sprøttere resultat). Tørk dem deretter helt med et papir- eller kjøkkenhåndkle.
step::Sprinkle some olive oil and salt o: Dryss over litt olivenolje og salt, og bland det sammen til det er jevnt.
step::Spread them out on a tray (importa: Fordel dem utover et stekebrett (viktig at de ikke ligger oppå hverandre) og stek på 220 grader i 25–35 minutter til de er gyllenbrune. Snu dem én gang etter 15–20 minutter.
step::Mix the first three ingredients an: Bland de tre første ingrediensene, og tilsett deretter den varme melken.
step::Sautéé the onion and garlic until: Stek løk og hvitløk til de er myke. Tilsett litt olje om ønskelig.
step::Have all the ingredients in the fo: Ha alle ingrediensene i foodprosessoren til en jevn masse.
step::Mix all the ingredients in the ble: Bland alle ingrediensene unntatt oliven i blenderen og kjør i 2 minutter til en jevn masse.
step::Add the olives and blend for 30 se: Tilsett olivenene og bland i 30 sekunder.
step::Boil the berries with ½ dl water f: Kok bærene med ½ dl vann i 7 minutter. I mellomtiden blander du maisenna, sukrin og kaldt vann i en kopp, og tilsetter det gradvis til bærene. Rør kontinuerlig og kok i 3 minutter til, deretter skrur du ned varmen. La det avkjøles før servering.
step::Heat olive oil in a large pot over: Varm olivenolje i en stor kjele på middels varme. Tilsett hakket løk og stek i ca. 3–5 minutter til den er myk og lett gyllen. Tilsett hvitløk, paprika og gulrot og stek i ytterligere 5–7 minutter til grønnsakene er møre.
step::Add the tomato paste, cumin, papri: Tilsett tomatpuré, spisskummen, paprikapulver, chili og oregano. Rør godt og la det koke i 1–2 minutter slik at krydderne får frigjøre smakene sine.
step::Add the black beans and water, and: Tilsett de svarte bønnene og vann, og kok i ytterligere 10 minutter for å varme bønnene gjennom og la smaken trenge inn i bønnene.
step::Taste the stew and adjust with mor: Smak på gryten og juster med mer salt eller krydder etter behov.
step::Squeeze the lime juice over the st: Press limesaften over gryten og rør om. Topp med hakket koriander.
step::If the red beet is juicy, roughly: Hvis rødbeten er saftig, tørk den grovt med et papirhåndkle. Dette vil bidra til å forhindre at alt blir rødt.
step::In a bowl, combine all the ingredi: I en bolle, bland de våte ingrediensene.
step::Defrost the berries, mash/blend th: Tin bærene, mos/kjør dem litt med en stavmikser, ikke glatte.
step::Add chia seeds and stir every now: Tilsett chiafrø og rør om av og til før oppbevaring.
step::Mix well the 3 first ingredients i: Bland de 3 første ingrediensene godt i diamantmikseren.
step::Add the remaining ingredients and: Tilsett de resterende ingrediensene og elt i minst 10 minutter.
step::Roll buns that are 100 grams each,: Rull til boller på 100 gram, legg dem på stekebrett dekket med bakepapir og la dem heve i omtrent en time.
step::Bake the rolls for about 20 minute: Stek rundstykkene i omtrent 20 minutter til de er gyllenbrune.
step::Take out and cover them with a tow: Ta dem ut og dekk dem med et håndkle til de er avkjølt.
step::Preeheet the oven on 170 degree ce: Forvarm ovnen på 170 grader celsius i 5 minutter.
step::Spread the walnuts on a baking tra: Fordel valnøttene i ett lag på en stekeplate.
step::Toast the walnuts in the oven for: Rist valnøttene i ovnen på 170 grader i 7–10 minutter.
step::Take out the walnuts right away, a: Ta ut valnøttene med en gang, og la dem avkjøles i romtemperatur.
step::When they have cooled, chopp them: Når de er avkjølt, hakk dem i mindre biter (hvis de ikke allerede er det i små biter i pakken).
step::Bring a large pot of water to boil: Kok opp en stor kjele med vann, og salt (smak til: det skal være like salt som sjøvann).
step::Add the broccoli florets and cook: Tilsett brokkolibukettene og kok (blancher) i omtrent 60 sekunder, til de er lysegrønne i fargen.
step::Immediately drain and rinse with c: Hell av vannet umiddelbart og skyll med kaldt vann i omtrent 2 minutter for å stoppe kokingen.
step::Dry the broccoli very well: place: Tørk brokkolien godt: legg den i en salatslynge, sentrifuger ut vannet, og tørk den deretter ytterligere med kjøkkenhåndklær for å fjerne overflødig fuktighet.
step::In a large bowl combine the brocco: I en stor bolle bland brokkoli, ristede valnøtter, soltørkede tomater, svarte bønner, skivet rødløk, soyamajones (separat oppskrift), sitron og salt.
Server den kald eller ved romtemperatur.
step::Peel the broccoli stems (if there: Skrell brokkolistilkene (hvis det er noen), skjær dem i små, jevne biter og legg dem i en bolle. Skjær bukettene i små, jevne biter og legg dem i en egen bolle.
step::In a pot add the oil, onions and g: Ha olje, løk og hvitløk i en kjele sammen med en klype salt. Stek forsiktig til løken er blank, ca. 10 minutter. Tilsett brokkolistilkene og rør slik at de dekkes med fett. Fortsett å steke i noen minutter til de er myke.
step::Mix the bouillon with half of the: Bland buljongen med halvparten av vannet (helst varmt) og ha det i kjelen.
step::Blend the cashews with the rest of: Bland cashewnøttene med resten av vannet til en jevn masse, og ha dem i kjelen. Skru opp varmen til middels og la suppen småkoke. Rør ofte for å sikre at bunnen ikke svir seg.
step::Once the stems are nearly tender,: Når stilkene er nesten møre, tilsetter du bukettene sammen med en god klype salt. La suppen småkoke forsiktig til bukettene er møre og gjennomkokte (ca. 10 min). Når bukettene er møre, tilsetter du salt etter smak.
step::Whisk the first three ingredients: Visp de tre første ingrediensene i en kjele og kok opp.
step::While boiling mix together corn st: Mens du koker, bland sammen maisenna og kaldt vann.
step::Slowly stir in the water corn star: Rør sakte inn vannet og maisennablandingen mens du visper.
step::Bring the water to boil in a water: Kok opp vannet i en vannkoker. For å få fart på prosessen, hell vann i en kjele på den varme komfyren. Når vannet koker, tilsett salt og bokhvete. La det koke opp igjen og dekk til med et lokk som er dekket med et rent kjøkkenhåndkle. Skru komfyren til laveste varme og la det dampe i 20 minutter.
step::Add onion and continue to steam fo: Tilsett løk og fortsett å dampe i ytterligere 10 minutter.
step::Remove the pot from the stove and: Ta kjelen av komfyren og tilsett resten av ingrediensene. Rør godt og smak til.
step::Option 1: Use the lid of a sprouti: Alternativ 1: Bruk lokket på et spireglass til å forme burgerne. Dekk nettet med plastfolie og trykk en del i lokket slik at det dekker omtrent ¾ av volumet. Form burgerne godt og trykk dem ut av formen.
step::Option 2: use ice cream scooper an: Alternativ 2: bruk en iskremskje og form burgerne med en skje, dypp dem i vann for å unngå at de setter seg fast.
step::Bake for 10 minutes on the first s: Stek i 10 minutter på den første siden, snu og stek i ytterligere 6 minutter.
step::Bring the water with salt to a boi: Kok opp vannet med salt og tilsett deretter bulguren. Ta kjelen av varmen og dekk til med lokk til alt vannet er absorbert (ca. 25 min). Avkjøl deretter bulguren.
step::Mix in a jar olive oil, lemon juic: Bland olivenolje, sitronsaft, honning, chiliflak og salt i en krukke.
step::Mix the bulgur with the veggies an: Bland bulguren med grønnsakene, og tilsett deretter dressingen.
step::Mix the flour, yeast, and salt in: Bland mel, gjær og salt i en stor bolle.
step::Add the water, honey, and oil, and: Tilsett vann, honning og olje, og elt deigen i omtrent 8–10 minutter til den blir glatt og elastisk og ikke lenger fester seg til bollen.
step::Cover the bowl and let the dough r: Dekk til bollen og la deigen heve i omtrent en time, eller til den har doblet seg i størrelse.
step::Divide the dough in roughly 110 gr: Del deigen i omtrent 110 gram per stykke og form dem til runde burgerbrød.
step::Place the buns on a baking sheet l: Legg bollene på en stekeplate dekket med bakepapir og la dem heve igjen i 30–40 minutter under et rent kjøkkenhåndkle.
step::Brush the tops with water or milk,: Pensle toppene med vann eller melk, og dryss over sesamfrø for et klassisk utseende.
step::Bake in a preheated oven at 200°C: Stek i en forvarmet ovn på 200 °C i 12–15 minutter, til de er gyllenbrune.
step::Blend all the ingredients together: Bland alle ingrediensene sammen til en jevn masse.
step::Remove the core from the cabbage a: Fjern kjernen fra kålen og skjær den i små biter (1-1,5 cm). Bland vannet med buljongen og sett til side.
step::Heat a large, heavy-bottomed pot o: Varm en stor kjele med tykk bunn over middels varme. Når den er varm, tilsett olje, løk, gulrøtter og en klype salt. La løken og gulroten svette til de er myke (men ikke brune). Tilsett hvitløk og stek i omtrent 1 minutt.
step::Add the cabbage and a pinch of sal: Tilsett kålen og en klype salt og la det småkoke i omtrent 10 minutter, rør av og til til det er mykt. Tilsett deretter kraften (buljongvann), tomater og salt, og la det småkoke.
step::Add the seasonings to the soup and: Tilsett krydderet i suppen og la den småkoke i omtrent 15 minutter.
step::Check the carrots and simmer for a: Sjekk gulrøttene og la dem småkoke i ytterligere 10 minutter eller så, til de er gjennomkokte og møre.
ingredient::Bread, extra coarse (75-100%: Brød, ekstra grovt (75–100 %), kjøpt, fullkornsbrød uten fullkorn
step::Soak the sundried tomatoes for 5-1: Legg de soltørkede tomatene i bløt i 5–10 minutter, og sil dem deretter av.
step::Use croutons, or make them; Cut th: Bruk krutonger, eller lag dem selv; Skjær brødet i terninger, bland med olje og salt. Forvarm ovnen til 180 °C og stek krutongene i 10 minutter, eller til de er helt gjennomstekt. Vend dem etter 5 minutter.
step::Cut or tear the lettuce into small: Skjær eller riv salaten i mindre biter.
step::Defrost strawberries and bananas (: Tin jordbær og bananer (de bør være HELT TINT, ellers vil du ikke oppnå en jevn konsistens).
step::Add all the ingredients into the V: Ha alle ingrediensene i Vitamixen, unntatt dadlene. Kjør i ca. 1,5 minutter på høyeste innstilling (til en jevn masse). Tilsett deretter dadlene og kjør i ytterligere 1 minutt på høyeste innstilling med den svarte pinnen.
step::Directly from the Vitamix, pour ou: Hell 8 dl direkte fra Vitamixen på et brett. Fordel det jevnt med en slikkepott.
step::Dehydrate for at least 9 hours or: Tørk i minst 9 timer eller mer om nødvendig ved 63 °C (det er ferdig når det er helt tørt, sjekk med fingrene).
step::Carefully remove the fruit leather: Fjern fruktskinnet forsiktig fra brettet med en gang, ellers blir det vanskeligere å fjerne det senere.
step::Roll up the whole fruit leather as: Rull sammen hele fruktlæret så stramt som mulig og skjær deretter i ca. 2,4 cm brede (bruk en linjal som veiledning i begynnelsen).
step::Store it in an airtight container: Oppbevar det i en lufttett beholder eller pakk det inn med en gang. Bruk en tang eller klipper til å legge godteriet i emballasjen eller posen.
step::Mix the maple sirup, coconut oil,: Bland lønnesirup, kokosolje, kanel og salt sammen.
step::Chop the nuts in smaller pieces, e: Hakk nøttene i mindre biter, enten med en kniv eller i foodprosessoren.
step::option 1: Put the nuts in a pan on: Alternativ 1: Ha nøttene i en kjele på middels varme i 3–5 minutter under jevnlig omrøring. Tilsett deretter sirupblandingen og rør kontinuerlig i 2–3 minutter. Fordel det deretter utover et stekebrett med bakepapir for å avkjøles.
step::option 2: Mix everything together: Alternativ 2: Bland alt godt sammen og fordel det jevnt på et stekebrett med bakepapir og stek i ovnen på 160 grader i 12–15 minutter (rør av og til).
step::Blend all ingredients in a high sp: Kjør alle ingrediensene i en høyhastighetsblender til en jevn masse. Husk å bare ha i 2/3 av karven før du blender og 1/3 etter at du har blandet.
step::Bring the mixture to a boil in a p: Kok opp blandingen i en kjele og la den koke under omrøring i minst 3–5 minutter.
step::In a preheated oven, roast the haz: I en forvarmet ovn steker du hasselnøttene i 15 minutter ved 170 grader.
step::Soak the dates in cooking water fo: Legg dadlene i bløt i kokevann i 15 minutter til de er myke.
step::Blend the hazelnuts for 2-3 minute: Kjør hasselnøttene i 2–3 minutter i en foodprosessor til de er glatte. Det er viktig at nøttene blir blandet til de frigjør oljen og blir til smør.
step::Add the remaining ingredients and: Tilsett de resterende ingrediensene og bland i 2 minutter.
step::Blend cashew, water, apple cider v: Bland cashewnøtter, vann, eplecidereddik og sitronsaft til en jevn masse.
step::Place the cashews, liquid, sweeten: Ha cashewnøttene, væsken, søtningsmiddelet, vaniljen og saltet i en blender på høy hastighet. Kjør på høy hastighet til en jevn masse, og skrap ned sidene av blenderkannen fra tid til annen.
step::In a bowl soak the cashews in wate: Legg cashewnøttene i bløt i vann i en bolle i 3–4 timer.
step::Heat pan to medium-low heat and ad: Varm pannen til middels lav varme og tilsett olivenolje. Tilsett løk og fres i 5–8 minutter til den er blank.
step::Add garlic and sweat for a couple: Tilsett hvitløk og stek i et par minutter ekstra.
step::Transfer into a blender and add th: Ha over i en blender og tilsett de resterende ingrediensene og kjør på høy hastighet til en jevn masse.
Bring it to a boil and serve hot.
Make cashew and water into milk.
step::Put everything in a pot, and whisk: Put everything in a pot, and whisk it until it is combined, and after that turn the stove on, on medium heat.
step::Let it simmer until thick consiste: Let it simmer until thick consistency, while you continually stir.
step::Blend cashews and water until smoo: Blend cashews and water until smooth. Set aside.
step::Sautéé onions in 1 tsp of olive oi: Sautéé onions in 1 tsp of olive oil and 2 tbsp of water until almost clear (no brown).
step::Add cauliflower, water and seasoni: Add cauliflower, water and seasoning and boil for 5 - 10 minutes.
step::Stir in the blended cashews and le: Stir in the blended cashews and lemon juice, reheat just to boil before serving.
step::Prepare cashew milk according to i: Prepare cashew milk according to instructions. (see cook side sheet).
step::Put all ingredients in a sauce pan: Put all ingredients in a sauce pan and stir with a whisk.
step::Once everything is combined, turn: Once everything is combined, turn on the heat.
step::Turn the heat to low to medium and: Turn the heat to low to medium and let it simmer while stirring constantly for one minute or until it gets a stretchy texture.
step::It is easier to handle when it is: It is easier to handle when it is warm. To reheat, add a splash of water or plant based milk and stir constantly until heated through.
step::Bring the water to a boil in a sau: Bring the water to a boil in a saucepan. Add the cauliflower, onion powder, garlic, and turmeric. Cover tightly and reduce the heat to very low. Simmer until the cauliflower is so tender that it easily comes apart when poked with a fork, about 15-20 minutes.
step::Carefully transfer the contents of: Carefully transfer the contents of the saucepan to a blender. Add all remaining ingredients. Blend, starting on low and increasing the speed until you’re at the highest setting. Blend until you have a completely smooth sauce.
step::Check taste and add salt as needed: Check taste and add salt as needed.
step::Pour the sauce back into the sauce: Pour the sauce back into the saucepan, and heat up, stirring occasionally. When it starts to buble, allow it to cook and thicken for at least another 2 minutes.
step::To prepare the dressing, put all t: To prepare the dressing, put all the ingredients (except the kale) in a high speed blender, blend until very smooth. You are looking for a creamy consistency. Use the black foot of the vitamix to help you smoothly blend all the ingredients.
step::To prepare the kale, first wash an: To prepare the kale, first wash and dry it carefully. Then, remove the leaves from the stems, keeping the pieces of kale as big as possible (this is beacuse they will shrink considerably once dehydrated/baked in the oven).
step::Place the kale into a large bowl a: Place the kale into a large bowl and pour the dressing over the kale.
step::With your hands (wear gloves), sta: With your hands (wear gloves), start to massage the kale making sure to evenly coat it with the dressing.
step::Once done, place the coated kale l: Once done, place the coated kale leaves onto dehydrator trays. Make sure the leaves are in a single layer, otherwise they will not dehydrate evenly. Dehydrate at 115 °F (46°C) for 6 hours (or until crispy).
step::Blend all the ingredients except p: Blend all the ingredients except parsley in a high speed blender for 30 seconds.
step::Pour the mixture in a form lined w: Pour the mixture in a form lined with baking paper (round or squared), the parsley and sprinkle with paprika and spring onion. Bake for 15-20 minutes at 170 degrees.
step::Serve in a round shape or pizza sl: Serve in a round shape or pizza slices with sourdough bread, tomato and cucumber.
step::To make the sour cream, drain and: To make the sour cream, drain and rinse the cashews. Next, blend together the cashews, water and lemon juice, until you reach a really smooth consistency.
Place chickpeas in a large bowl.
step::Using a potato masher or a fork, m: Using a potato masher or a fork, mash the chickpeas to break them up. Make sure all chickpeas are at least partly broken up.
step::Next, add the onion, celery and cu: Next, add the onion, celery and cucumber. Add the nori flakes, cashew cream and salt and mix to combine.
step::Place small amounts of the salad i: Place small amounts of the salad in washed salad leaves for serving.
step::Whisk together the chickpea flour,: Whisk together the chickpea flour, salt, olive oil and 1/3 of the water. Make sure it is without lumps.
step::Heat up the rest of the water. Whe: Heat up the rest of the water. When it is cooking, lower the heat to medium and pour in the chickpea mixture slowly while you continuously whisk.
step::Continue stirring until it reaches: Continue stirring until it reaches a pudding-like consistency. This will take a few minutes.
step::Pour the mixture into a mold while: Pour the mixture into a mold while it is hot and let it cool down and harden.
step::Preheat the oven to 170 °C. Spread: Preheat the oven to 170 °C. Spread the almonds out on a baking tray and bake them for 8 minutes. Let them cool down and then chop roughly.
step::Whisk together the honey, lemon ju: Whisk together the honey, lemon juice, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
step::Slice thinly the chinese cabbage a: Slice thinly the chinese cabbage and the spring onion and place them in a bowl. Add the almonds and dressing, then mix the salad just before serving.
step::Sautéé onion and leek in a little: Sautéé onion and leek in a little oil. When it´s starting to get soft, add garlic.
step::Grate celery and carrots or slice: Grate celery and carrots or slice them in thin stripes.
step::Sautée all vegetables with salt fo: Sautée all vegetables with salt for 5 min. Add boiled water and continue to cook till carrots are soft.
step::Take part of the soup (for eksempe: Take part of the soup (for eksempel 1L) and blend with cashew and ginger till smooth.
step::Soak rice noodles in warm water fo: Soak rice noodles in warm water for 2 min. Cut them 3-4 cm long and add to soup.
Bring to a boil, and it´s ready.

step::Cook the millet and 3/4 of the wat: Cook the millet and 3/4 of the water into a porridge. Cook well through (at least fourty minutes). Or use 900g cooked porridge (multiply the amount with how many times you do the recipe).
step::Let the porridge cool down enough: Let the porridge cool down enough to handle with your hands.
step::Blend almonds and 1/4 of the water: Blend almonds and 1/4 of the water in a high speed blender until the almonds are crushes into small bits.
step::Put all ingredients in a metal bow: Put all ingredients in a metal bowl and mix thoroughly to avoid lumps. Preferably with your hands, use gloves.
step::Line the baking trays with baking: Line the baking trays with baking paper. Put 1/11 part of the dough in the baking paper, and put a plastic wrap over the dough, and use a rolling pin to spread out the dough between the baking paper and the plastic wrap (it should be about 0.5 - 1 cm thick layer). Then remove the prastic wrap (you can use the same plastic wrap on all the trays).
step::Slice the dough with pizza slicer: Slice the dough with pizza slicer (or a big knife). Two times on the short side and 5 times on the long side so you get 18 same sized squares.
step::Bake until the crispbread is dry a: Bake until the crispbread is dry and cooked all the way through. It takes at least 3 hours.
step::Cool down; Place another tray on a: Cool down; Place another tray on a tray with crackers and flip it so the crackers are laying uppside down on the other tray and take away the tray it was laying on and rip off the baking paper. Let it cool down on the tray before cracking them in the cut squares and put in airtight boxes.
step::Heat the oil in a large, heavy bot: Heat the oil in a large, heavy bottomed pot.
step::Once the oil gets hot, throw in di: Once the oil gets hot, throw in diced onion, celery, carrot and zucchini. Sautéé on a very low heat until soft (15 minutes) with lid and stirr regularly.
Add garlic, bay leaves and herbs. Sautéé for another 5 minutes, stirring regularly.
step::Mix in smoked paprika, chilli and: Mix in smoked paprika, chilli and salt.
step::Add canned tomatoes and some of th: Add canned tomatoes and some of the water. Cover and simmer for about 30-45 minutes. Top up with more water if the pot is looking dry.
step::Add in the rest of water and cubed: Add in the rest of water and cubed potatoes. Once the soup comes to a simmer, cook 5 minutes.
step::Next add in pasta. Cover the pot w: Next add in pasta. Cover the pot with a lid and simmer for about 6 minutes.
step::Add spinach and white beans and si: Add spinach and white beans and simmer for further 5 minutes – until all the ingredients are fully cooked.
step::Blend all the soy yogurt and garli: Blend all the soy yogurt and garlic in a high-speed blender for 15-20 seconds. Then add the lemon juice, salt, and mint for 10 seconds more. Do not over-blend. Adjust the lemon juice to taste.
step::Marinate the tofu cubes in soy sau: Marinate the tofu cubes in soy sauce, sesame oil and red chili.
step::Bring water with a little salt and: Bring water with a little salt and oil to a boil.
step::Cook the noodles according to the: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions.
step::Drain and rince with cold water to: Drain and rince with cold water to prevent sticking.
step::Pan fry the small tofu cubes in oi: Pan fry the small tofu cubes in oil.
step::Heat oil in a big pan (or wok). Sa: Heat oil in a big pan (or wok). Sautéé onion, garlic and ginger until soft.
step::Add bell pepper, carrot and cabbag: Add bell pepper, carrot and cabbage. Stir-fry on high heat for 3-4min.
step::Add the marinate (soy sauce, sesam: Add the marinate (soy sauce, sesame oil and chili), ketchup, salt and pepper.
step::Add the noodles and tofu. Stir fry: Add the noodles and tofu. Stir fry for 3-4 min.
step::How to sprout seeds if not using b: How to sprout seeds if not using bought sprouts; Rinse thoroughly under cold water to remove dirt or phytic acid. Soak in a bowl with plenty of clean water for 12 hours. Drain and rinse well. Keet it in a siv with a clean tea towel over, at room temperature. Rinse the sprouts with fresh water morning and evening. They are ready in 1-4 days depending on the type, room temperature and desired size.
step::Ground all nuts in the food proces: Ground all nuts in the food processor for 30 seconds.
step::Sautéé the onion with olive oil in: Sautéé the onion with olive oil in a pan until soft.
step::Combine all the ingredients and mi: Combine all the ingredients and mix it well. Add soymilk or water if it is too dry.
step::Pour the mixture into a bread form: Pour the mixture into a bread form (20x12x7,5 cm) Fill half the bread form with the nutloaf mixture. Then bake it on 175 °C for 1 hour until cooked.
step::Bring the water to a boil and add: Bring the water to a boil and add remaining ingredients besides the oats, cook for 5 minutes.
step::Add the oats and cook for at least: Add the oats and cook for at least 3 minutes until thick as a porridge. Let the mix cool down a bit.
step::Scoop the mixture into small balls: Scoop the mixture into small balls (preferably with a ice cream scoop) and put them on a baking tray lined with baking paper and form them into burgers.
step::Bake the oat burgers for at least: Bake the oat burgers for at least 20 minutes.
Let them set a bit before serving.
step::Mix first dry ingredients, add the: Mix first dry ingredients, add then fluids.
step::Stir until well mixed and spread t: Stir until well mixed and spread then quickly to set to the bottom and sides of a baking form in a 1 cm layer.
step::Chop onion and garlic in the food: Chop onion and garlic in the food processor, then slice the leek.
step::Sautée the vegetables with thyme a: Sautée the vegetables with thyme and bullion for 15 min on high heat adding water if it starts to stick.
step::Meanwhile make the cashew cream by: Meanwhile make the cashew cream by blending water and cashews in a blender on high speed for 1-2 min.
step::Add cashew cream and stir for 1 -: Add cashew cream and stir for 1 - 2 min.
step::Spread the filling on top of the c: Spread the filling on top of the crust in a 2 cm layer.
step::The cheese should be thinly spread: The cheese should be thinly spread on top in an even layer. (see separated recipe).
step::In a preheated oven, bake at 175°C: In a preheated oven, bake at 175°C for 22 minutes.
step::Blend the ingredients in foodprose: Blend the ingredients in foodprosessor until it is approximately 1mm chunks.
step::Roast the sesame seeds; Heat the p: Roast the sesame seeds; Heat the pan, add the sesame seeds, stir the seeds continuously with a wooden spoon, roast until slightly puff and become fragrant (2-5min), then transfer the seeds to a cool plate/tray to stop the cooking.
step::Peel the fresh ginger with a spoon: Peel the fresh ginger with a spoon or knife, and slice it into very thin slices.
step::In a small pot, bring the water to: In a small pot, bring the water to a boil and add maple syrup.. Stir until it is dissolved.
step::Add the sliced ginger and lemon ju: Add the sliced ginger and lemon juice. Let it simmer on low heat for 15-20 minutes until the ginger becomes tender and absorbs the flavors.
step::Remove the pot from the heat and l: Remove the pot from the heat and let the mixture cool completely. Once cooled, transfer the ginger and syrup into a sealed glass jar and store it in the refrigerator.
step::Blend all ingredients (including t: Blend all ingredients (including the pineapple juice) on high speed until smooth.
step::Measure the water and pour the yea: Measure the water and pour the yeast on top. Let it desolve before mixing in. Add the flour.
step::Add the rest of the ingredients, a: Add the rest of the ingredients, and mix well.
step::Knead the dough for at least 10 mi: Knead the dough for at least 10 minutes. Roll the dough and form it out on a baking tray with baking paper. Forming it thinner is better than too thick. Cover with a kitchen towel to prevent the bread from drying out. Let it rise for 1 hour or til double in size. Preheat the oven to 170 °C. Pre-bake the crust at 170 °C for 10 minutes.
step::Make the cashew cheese (see a sepe: Make the cashew cheese (see a seperate recipe: White Cashew Sauce). Don´t cook it too long so it gets unnessesary thick, or it will be hard to spread out on the pizza.
step::Spread first the tomato sauce on t: Spread first the tomato sauce on the pizza crust, then add the veggies and then cashew cheese/sauce on top.
Bake for 15-20 minutes on 170 °C. Make sure it doesn't burn on the sides.
step::Cut the pizza and decorate with ru: Cut the pizza and decorate with ruccola. Sprinkle with oregano and olive oil.
step::Put the almonds in boiling water f: Put the almonds in boiling water for a couple of minutes, then simply peel the almonds.
step::Mix the nuts and water until smoot: Mix the nuts and water until smooth.
step::The coconut oil must be melted in: The coconut oil must be melted in order to mix, and it best to make sure the other ingredients are not too cold so the coconut oil doesn't solidify while you mix (coconut oil has a melting point of about 24℃).
step::Add the rest of the ingredients an: Add the rest of the ingredients and mix for at least 2 more minutes, so that a lot of air gets into it.
step::Pour it into a bowl/box and place: Pour it into a bowl/box and place it in the refrigerator to harden (may take several hours).
step::Blend very well all ingredients. (: Blend very well all ingredients. (you can start blending the apple and ginger with just some of the liquid to make sure it is blended well).
step::Marinade the tofu in the poke dres: Marinade the tofu in the poke dressing (another recipe) at least one hour.
Mix flour and water into a paste.
step::Dip the tofu in the flour paste an: Dip the tofu in the flour paste and then in the sesame crumbs.
step::Spray it with oil and bake it in t: Spray it with oil and bake it in the oven at 200celsius for 20 minutes (or on a oiled pan), until golden brown.
step::Bring the water or milk to a boil,: Bring the water or milk to a boil, with the salt.
step::Once the liquid is boiling, reduce: Once the liquid is boiling, reduce the heat and slowly whisk in the polenta. Make sure to stir continuously to prevent lumps.
step::Let the polenta simmer on low heat: Let the polenta simmer on low heat for about 15-20 minutes, stirring regularly. The polenta should thicken and become soft.
step::Once the polenta is cooked, stir i: Once the polenta is cooked, stir in the olive oil or butter and honey.
step::Remove the core of the tomatoes an: Remove the core of the tomatoes and cut them in 4 pieces or so.
step::Sautéé the onion with olive oil, o: Sautéé the onion with olive oil, on medium heat, until soft.
step::Add the tomatoes and salt and simm: Add the tomatoes and salt and simmer for 30-40minutes until the tomatoes are breaking/soft.
step::Add the basil leaves a short time: Add the basil leaves a short time (approx. 2min) before serveing, enough time to get soft and hot but short enough to keep the green color.
step::Blend half of the water with the c: Blend half of the water with the cashews and set aside.
step::Sautéé onion and garlic in ½ tsp o: Sautéé onion and garlic in ½ tsp of olive oil and 1 tbsp of water until soft.
step::Add the potatoes and carrots and s: Add the potatoes and carrots and sautéé for 2 - 3 minutes, add some water if needed.
step::Add the remaining water, the cashe: Add the remaining water, the cashew cream, bouillon, salt and cauliflower and bring to a boil. Cook for about 10 - 15 minutes until the potato is soft.
step::Just before serving, add the spina: Just before serving, add the spinach and lemon juice, bring up to a boil.
step::Peel the potato and then grate wit: Peel the potato and then grate with a mandolin or coupe machine and steam them in the oven for 20 minutes at 98 degrees.
step::Coat the baking form with rapeseed: Coat the baking form with rapeseed oil. Preheat the oven when the potatoes are done.
step::Blend all the ingredients from the: Blend all the ingredients from the sauce except merian.
step::Bake everything in the preheated o: Bake everything in the preheated oven for 20 minutes at 200 degrees Celsius.
step::Peel the potatoes and cut them in: Peel the potatoes and cut them in small cubes.
step::Put the cubes potatoes in salted w: Put the cubes potatoes in salted water and cook them until soft (but not breaking apart). Takes approx. 10-15min. from it starts to bubble.
step::Once they’re done, drain the water: Once they’re done, drain the water immediately to prevent overcooking, and let the potatoes cool down.
Mix everything gently in a bowl.
step::Rinse, peel and dice potatoes. Put: Rinse, peel and dice potatoes. Put inside the 1l of water to prevent oxidation.
step::Peel the pumpkin and dice. Lay asi: Peel the pumpkin and dice. Lay aside.
Heat the pot to medium-high heat.
step::Medium dice the onions and add to: Medium dice the onions and add to the hot pot. Use a little of the water and salt to sautéé the onions.
step::Meanwhile, finely chop both ginger: Meanwhile, finely chop both ginger and garlic. Add to the pot, continuing to sautéé for another minute.
step::Sieve out the potatoes from the wa: Sieve out the potatoes from the water, and add the potatoes, pumpkin, the rest of the salt and a little more of the water to the pot. Sautée for 5 minutes.
step::Add the rest of the water and coco: Add the rest of the water and coconut milk.
step::Bring the veggies to a boil. Then: Bring the veggies to a boil. Then simmer them until softened (ca 20-30 min).
step::Blend the spoup to a creamy textur: Blend the spoup to a creamy texture.
step::Serve with kale chips and seasoned: Serve with kale chips and seasoned baked chickpeas.
step::Roast the walnuts in a pan or in a: Roast the walnuts in a pan or in a preheated oven for 7 minutes at 180 degrees.
step::Rinse the quinoa and put it to coo: Rinse the quinoa and put it to cook with the water for 5 minutes, then reduce the heat and let it set until all the water is absorbed. Let it cool down.
step::Preheat the oven 200 degrees. Roas: Preheat the oven 200 degrees. Roast the paprika for 45 minutes. Take out of the oven and store in an airtight container and let it sweet until cool. Then peel off the chared and blackened parts.
step::Bring the quinoa to a boil and the: Bring the quinoa to a boil and then reduce to the lowest heat and cover with a lid. You may put a metal protection underneath to prevent burning. When done, cool down the quinoa before mixing with the other ingredients.
step::Mix all the ingredients the last t: Mix all the ingredients the last two and then add the dressing.
step::Whisk all ingredients together, ex: Whisk all ingredients together, except the herbs. Add more water if needed.
step::After you have blended the sauce,: After you have blended the sauce, add the fresh herbs.
step::Should sit in the cooler at least: Should sit in the cooler at least 30min so that the flavors can blend before serving.
step::Defrost and mash/blend the berries: Defrost and mash/blend the berries a bit with a hand blender, not smooth.
Add the datepuré and mix well.
step::Put the first ingredients (nuts, d: Put the first ingredients (nuts, dates, shredded coconut and salt) in the food prosessor and blend until small pieces and it starts to be able to form something that can hold together when you push it together with your fingers.
step::Either take a cake form and put ba: Either take a cake form and put bakingpaper in the bottom or take a deep baking form. Press the nut mix down in the bottom , evenly.
step::Blend the next 5 ingredients (from: Blend the next 5 ingredients (from cashews to vanillapowder). Add water if nessesary to blend.
step::Pour it on top of the nut layer an: Pour it on top of the nut layer and spread it out evenly.
step::If the filling is thin (liquidy),: If the filling is thin (liquidy), put it in the fridge for 1-2 hours to let it thicken. (unless you want to make the topping incorporate in the filling).
step::Blend the berries, honey and cocon: Blend the berries, honey and coconut until smooth and pour it on top of the cake filling.
step::Cool down in the fridge for at lea: Cool down in the fridge for at least 1 hour to let it set/thicken.
step::Peel the red beet, cut in 2-3 cm c: Peel the red beet, cut in 2-3 cm cubs and boil for 20 minutes.
step::Soak the sun dried tomato for 5 mi: Soak the sun dried tomato for 5 minutes and then strain. (doesn´t need to soak if you are using the ones that are in oil).
step::Ground the cashews in a food proce: Ground the cashews in a food processor (preferably in a thermomix) until finely ground. Add the remaining ingredients and process 1-2 minutes until smooth. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 - 4 days.
step::Mix all ingredients into a bowl an: Mix all ingredients into a bowl and massage for a few minutes so that the cabbage softens up a bit.
step::Option 1: Steam the potatoes for 3: Option 1: Steam the potatoes for 30-45 minutes in the oven. Option 2: Set the potatoes and red beets in two separate pots and cook with the peel until it is done.
step::Meanwhile, prepare the rest of the: Meanwhile, prepare the rest of the ingredients. There is a separate recipe for the soya mayo.
step::Peel and dice the potatoes and red: Peel and dice the potatoes and red beets and put them in a large bowl.
step::Add the rest of the ingredients an: Add the rest of the ingredients and at the end, soya mayonnaise and mix altogether.
step::Adjust the salt and lemon juice, i: Adjust the salt and lemon juice, if necessary.
step::Blend the first 4 ingredients in t: Blend the first 4 ingredients in the food prosessor.
step::Saauté the onion with a little oli: Saauté the onion with a little olive oil and sea salt.
step::Take 100g for each burger and form: Take 100g for each burger and form them round and approxinately 1,5cm thick.
step::Put them on a tray with baking pap: Put them on a tray with baking paper.
step::Bake on 200 degrees for 20min, the: Bake on 200 degrees for 20min, then turn them and bake for 5min. more.
step::Sautéé the onion and garlic in ½ t: Sautéé the onion and garlic in ½ tsp olive oil and 1 tbsp water.
step::Add spices and bouillon, cook for: Add spices and bouillon, cook for 30 seconds.
step::Add remaining ingredients and cook: Add remaining ingredients and cook until lentils are soft.
step::Put rice and water in a pot and br: Put rice and water in a pot and bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce to low heat and put a lid on. Let it simmer, stirring occasionally, until the rice is very soft and the mixture starts to thicken. (approx. 40-60min.).
step::Stir in the coconut milk, vanilla: Stir in the coconut milk, vanilla powder, salt, cinnamon and maple syrup.
step::Preheat your oven to 200° degrees: Preheat your oven to 200° degrees Celsius.
step::Cut the cauliflower florets into e: Cut the cauliflower florets into even-sized pieces. The very large florets can be sliced in half.
step::To make the dressing; mix all the: To make the dressing; mix all the remaining ingredients.
step::Place the cauliflower into the dre: Place the cauliflower into the dressing and toss to coat.
step::Bake for 8 minutes at 200° degrees: Bake for 8 minutes at 200° degrees Celsius.
step::Wash the paprika and poke them wit: Wash the paprika and poke them with a form. Bake whole the paprika for 30 to 40 minutes. Take out of the oven and store in an airtight container and let it sweet until cool. Then peel off the chared and blackened parts.
step::Prepare the seitan base: mix toget: Prepare the seitan base: mix together gluten flour, nutritional yeast, onion powder, garlic powder.
step::Mix the Seitan Base Mix, roasted b: Mix the Seitan Base Mix, roasted bell pepper, chickpeas (crushed in your hand as you add or in the food processor), chili flakes, cumin, smoked paprika, honey, sea salt, pepper, sautééed onion, and parsley.
step::In a blender, add the tofu, remain: In a blender, add the tofu, remaining roasted bell peppers, garlic, vegetable boullion, water and hot sauce. Blend until smooth.
step::To form the dough, you must combin: To form the dough, you must combine the dry and the wet batches. Create a small well in the center of the dry batch. Gradually add the wet batch into the well, stopping frequently to stir. Continue until the dough takes on a sturdy consistency. You should use most if not all the liquid. The texture is correct if you are able to rip the dough apart with a bit of give.
step::To shape the sausages, cut the dou: To shape the sausages, cut the dough into sausage size pieces: 110 grams. Wrap them in aluminium foil like candy.
step::Steam sausages for 45 min. Remove: Steam sausages for 45 min. Remove from the steamer and allow to cool a bit before removing the wrapping.
step::Once cooled, remove the wrapping a: Once cooled, remove the wrapping and bake for 10-15 minutes at 170 degrees.
title::Roasted Sweet Potato and Arugula: Roasted Sweet Potato and Arugula Salad
step::Toss the sweet potatoes with olive: Toss the sweet potatoes with olive oil.
step::On a tray spread out the potatoes: On a tray spread out the potatoes evenly. Place in the oven and roast for 25 minutes or until tender and slightly browned. Then let the potatoes cool until they are near room temperature. Make sure that the pieces don’t touch each other so that they bake well.
step::Prepare the dressing while the pot: Prepare the dressing while the potatoes are roasting in a small bowl, by whisking together the lemon juice, honey, cinnamon and chives.
step::Just before serving, in a large bo: Just before serving, in a large bowl, gently toss together the arugula and carrot. Next, add the potatoes, drizzle with dressing and toss.
step::Defrost the brussel sprout: Pour h: Defrost the brussel sprout: Pour hot water on the brussel sprouts and wait a couple of minutes. Then pour out the water.
step::Mix all ingredients in a bowl. Mak: Mix all ingredients in a bowl. Make sure the seasonings are evenly spread out on them.
step::Spread the brussel sprouts out on: Spread the brussel sprouts out on a baking tray lined with a silicone mat or baking paper.
step::Roast the brussel sprouts for abou: Roast the brussel sprouts for about 15 - 20 minutes until roasted.
step::Whisk together all the first ingre: Whisk together all the first ingredients down to and including lemon juice but just 1/3 of the water. Make sure it is without lumps.
step::Heat up the rest of the first wate: Heat up the rest of the first water amount. When it is cooking, lower the heat to medium and pour in the chickpea mixture slowly while you continuously whisk.
step::Mix water and flour in a bowl to a: Mix water and flour in a bowl to a thick runny paste.
step::Mix breadcrunbs, nori paper (crush: Mix breadcrunbs, nori paper (crush until very small pieces in the small blender), onion powder and dill (if dry) in another bowl.
step::Cut the chickpea tofu in strips, 1: Cut the chickpea tofu in strips, 1-2 cm thick (like fish fillet).
step::Dip the chikpea strips in the flou: Dip the chikpea strips in the flourmix to covered of the flour mix.
step::Then put them in the crumb mix and: Then put them in the crumb mix and get the covered of the crumb mix.
step::Take a big pan and pan fry them wi: Take a big pan and pan fry them with olive oil until golden.
step::Put the beetroot, oil, salt, papri: Put the beetroot, oil, salt, paprika powder and cayenne on a tray with baking paper and mix it around to make sure sure the oil and seasonings are spread out evenly on the beetroot. Bake/roast them in the oven at 200°C for 25-30min.
step::Do the same with the carrots as th: Do the same with the carrots as the beetroots. (But not mix them. Both because they might need different baking time and the beetroots will color the carrots).
step::Chopp the pecans in smaller pieces: Chopp the pecans in smaller pieces. Have them on baking paper in the oven with maple syrup at 180°C for 10-12min.
step::Remove the stem from the kale and: Remove the stem from the kale and ripp the leaves in bite size pieces and put it in a bowl. Massage the kale with avocado, lime juice, garlic and salt to spread out the flavors and to soften the fibers in the kale leaves.
step::When all components is cold, mix t: When all components is cold, mix them together.
step::Put flour and salt in a bowl and m: Put flour and salt in a bowl and mix it together.
step::Add a little of the water at a tim: Add a little of the water at a time while kneding it into a dough. The dough should be a little harder than a bread dough.
step::Split the dough in pieces, approxi: Split the dough in pieces, approximately 45g each piece, and roll out into thin round "pancakes" , which will be about 15–18 cm in diameter.
step::Fry the bread rolls over high heat: Fry the bread rolls over high heat in a dry frying pan for a couple of minutes. Turn the bread rolls frequently so they don't burn. Curl/roll the bread rolls in a kitchen towel to keep them soft.
step::Mix in a bowl and set aside for fl: Mix in a bowl and set aside for flavours to incorporate.
step::Heat a large fry pan over medium-h: Heat a large fry pan over medium-high heat. Once hot, add the oil, followed by the carrots.
step::Let cook for a bit on the first si: Let cook for a bit on the first side to develop a bit of color. Then toss and continue to cook until the carrots are almost cooked through. Add water as necessarily.
step::Taste for seasoning and then top w: Taste for seasoning and then top with the green onions. Toss to combine and serve immediately.
step::Marinade crumbled tofu with soya s: Marinade crumbled tofu with soya sauce.
step::Bring a fry pan to medium–high hea: Bring a fry pan to medium–high heat and add the olive oil. Add the onions and reduce heat to medium. Sautéé until they are translucent and golden, then add the garlic and peppers.
step::Once the onion and garlic are cara: Once the onion and garlic are caramelized, add the crumbled tofu. Cook on high heat for 4 minutes until the ingredients begin to brown slightly.
step::Next, add the nutritional yeast, o: Next, add the nutritional yeast, optional Indian black salt, turmeric and cook for another 3 to 5 minutes.
step::Right before serving, add the spin: Right before serving, add the spinach and a handful of fresh italian herbs.
step::Add olive oil and spices, and mix: Add olive oil and spices, and mix very well.
step::Bake it at 200 Celsius for 22 minu: Bake it at 200 Celsius for 22 minutes.
step::Set-in the steaming module and pre: Set-in the steaming module and preheat the oven at 98 degrees celsius.
step::Steam for 15 minute at 98 degrees: Steam for 15 minute at 98 degrees celsius.
step::Set in baking module and preheat t: Set in baking module and preheat the oven at 200 degrees celsius.
step::Toss with olive oil and salt, then: Toss with olive oil and salt, then bake for 20 minutes at 200 degrees celsius.
Garnish with fresh or dried herbs.
step::Take the fruits out of the freezer: Take the fruits out of the freezer 5 minutes before making the sorbet.
step::Place all the ingredients in a foo: Place all the ingredients in a food processor (preferably thermomix) and blend for 2-3 minutes. You might need to stop and mix with a spoon a few times. Use an ice cream scoop or spoon to form a nice sorbet scoop. Best when served immediately. If serving later, place in the freezer and take out to soften approx. 5 min before serving.
step::Blend all ingredients in a blender: Blend all ingredients in a blender/vitamix, without the lemon juice and oil, until the garlic is compleately smooth.
step::Add the lemon juice and oil while: Add the lemon juice and oil while blending on medium speed, and blend on high speed until it is thick in texture.
step::1: Preferably soak the cashews in: 1: Preferably soak the cashews in water some hours to make them soft. Strain the cashews and pour out the water.
step::2: Blend the cashews with the yogu: 2: Blend the cashews with the yogurt and half of the water. Start slow and then on high speed for at least 1min to make sure it is completaly smooth consistency.
step::3: Let the batter rest in a glass: 3: Let the batter rest in a glass bowl for approximately 24 hours, in room temperature. Can be covered with a tea towl or plastikk foil with holes in so the batter gets air.
step::Whisk in the salt and tapioca flou: Whisk in the salt and tapioca flour.
Prepare a big bowl with ice water. Use ice cubes or the blue freezepacks.
step::Have the rest of the water and the: Have the rest of the water and the agar agar in a pot. Visp and cook 3-4 min.
step::Add the batter to the pot and whis: Add the batter to the pot and whisk it in. Then continue cooking on middle temperature, continuesly stiring with a wooden spoon with flat end.
step::The batter is finished cooking whe: The batter is finished cooking when it has become thick , shiny and stretchy. Then scoop up balls with a ice cream spoon (with ejector) and scoop out the balls as round as possible in the ice water.
step::Let the mozzarella balls rest in t: Let the mozzarella balls rest in the ice water for 20-30min.
step::Take the balls out from the water,: Take the balls out from the water, into a container and store cold.
step::Blend half of the beetroot and all: Blend half of the beetroot and all the other ingredients without the garlic, untill completaly smooth.
step::Bring the mixture to a boil in a p: Bring the mixture to a boil in a pot and when it starts bobbling, let it boil while stirring for at least 3-5 minutes.
step::Blend the mixture again with the r: Blend the mixture again with the rest of the beetroot and garlic.
step::Pour into glasses (that has a prac: Pour into glasses (that has a practical shape so it can be taken out without being destroyed) and let cool down before refrigerating.
step::Before serving; take it out of the: Before serving; take it out of the glass and cutt in thin slices.
step::Make the dressing just before serv: Make the dressing just before serving. Blend all the soy yogurt and garlic in a high-speed blender for 15-20 seconds. Then add the lemon juice and salt. Do not over-blend. Adjust the lemon juice to taste.
step::Preheat the oven to 100°C for 10 m: Preheat the oven to 100°C for 10 minutes.
step::Cut the potatoes lengthwise in hal: Cut the potatoes lengthwise in half, then once more in the same direction, so you end up with 4 wedges per potato.
step::Place in the oven and steam at 98°: Place in the oven and steam at 98°C for 25 minutes.
step::Add salt and garnish with fresh or: Add salt and garnish with fresh or dry parsley.
step::Blend all the ingredients in the b: Blend all the ingredients in the blender for 30 seconds.
step::Bake the waffles in the waffle mac: Bake the waffles in the waffle machine.
step::Sautée onion, garlic, leek (sliced: Sautée onion, garlic, leek (sliced in rings) and carrots (grated) with 4 tbsp water, soy sauce and oil. Cook until soft.
step::Don’t add more oil and water for l: Don’t add more oil and water for larger amounts.
step::Grate tofu and add it to the veget: Grate tofu and add it to the vegetables.
step::For large portions it is nice to u: For large portions it is nice to use the machine to grate vegetables and tofu.
step::Blend the cashew with water, yeast: Blend the cashew with water, yeast flakes, salt and turmeric and add it to the tofu and veggie mixture.
step::Mix all together and add finely ch: Mix all together and add finely chopped fresh parsley.
step::Let the mixture stay for 5 minutes: Let the mixture stay for 5 minutes for the tofu to absorb the flavor.
step::Cut the paprika into half and fill: Cut the paprika into half and fill with the tofu mixture.
step::Bake the stuffed paprika for 35 mi: Bake the stuffed paprika for 35 minutes at 150 degrees or untill the paprika is cooked through.
step::To make the smoothie, place everyt: To make the smoothie, place everything into the high-speed blender and blend for a couple of minutes or until smooth and creamy. Taste and adjust your flavors and re-blend if desired. Serve immediately.
step::Adjust the sweetness after your ta: Adjust the sweetness after your taste.
step::Blend the first four ingredients i: Blend the first four ingredients in a blender until smooth consistency.
step::Add fiber husk to the blender and: Add fiber husk to the blender and blend a little more to combind it.
step::Pour the mixture into a bowl and w: Pour the mixture into a bowl and whisk in the rest of the ingredients.
step::Preheat the oven at 180 celcius de: Preheat the oven at 180 celcius degrees.
step::Choose a form that is a size that: Choose a form that is a size that will make the mixture 1-1,5cm thick when it´s poured in. spread/paint the form with oil an dpour the mixture in.
step::Bake in the midlle of the oven for: Bake in the midlle of the oven for 30 min. until golden/medium brown on the top.
step::Let it rest at room temperature to: Let it rest at room temperature to get more stiff.
step::If it´s not served the same day, s: If it´s not served the same day, simply heat it up before serving.
step::Peel th esweet potato and cut in s: Peel th esweet potato and cut in smaller and eaven pieces. Put then in a pot with water and cook until they are soft.
step::In a large bowl, combine the flour: In a large bowl, combine the flour, cinnamon, baking powder, baking soda and salt. Mix the dry ingredients together.
step::In the vitamix, combine the cooked: In the vitamix, combine the cooked sweet potato, maple syrup, coconut oil (preferably melted), non-dinary milk and vanilla. Blend on high until totally smooth and creamy.
step::Pour the pureéd swwet potato mixtu: Pour the pureéd swwet potato mixture into the large bowl with the dry ingredients. Gently stir and fold everything together until JUST combined.
step::Preheat the oven to 180 degrees ce: Preheat the oven to 180 degrees celsius.
step::Put paper baking cups in the metal: Put paper baking cups in the metal baking form and fill them with the mixture, approximately half full in each.
step::Topp them with some chopped pecans: Topp them with some chopped pecans as garnish. Press them into the batter so they stick.
step::Bake the muffins for 20min or unti: Bake the muffins for 20min or until the tops are domed and slightly darkened and a knife inserted into the middle of one comes out clean.
step::Let the muffins cool down complete: Let the muffins cool down completely before serving.
step::Sautée onion, garlic and curry pow: Sautée onion, garlic and curry powder with a little water until soft.
step::Add the rest of the water, bouillo: Add the rest of the water, bouillon and sweet potato. Let is simmer with a lid until the potatoes are cooked through (approx. 15min).
step::Soak yellow peas over night. Then: Soak yellow peas over night. Then cook the yellow peas separatelly.
step::Sautéee onion on medium heat until: Sautéee onion on medium heat until soft.
step::Add carrot and salt, and continue: Add carrot and salt, and continue sautéé until the carrots are tender.
step::Add the yellow peas, water and tur: Add the yellow peas, water and turmeric powder, and cook until everything is well combined and hot.
step::Take half of the soup and pulse it: Take half of the soup and pulse it in the food processor or vitamix a few times.
step::Garnish with chopped parsley on to: Garnish with chopped parsley on top .
step::Dice tofu and marinade 1 - 2 hours: Dice tofu and marinade 1 - 2 hours with some soy sauce, onion and garlic powder. Bake afterwards for 20 minutes at 170 °C.
step::Sautée onions and leek in 1 tsp of: Sautée onions and leek in 1 tsp of olive oil or water until translucent.
step::Add carrots and let cook for about: Add carrots and let cook for about 10 minutes stirring regularly. Add hot water and let it cook for another 15 min.
step::Add tofu, roasted paprika, coconut: Add tofu, roasted paprika, coconut milk.
step::Lastly just before serving, add th: Lastly just before serving, add the noodles and bring it to a boil.
step::If tofu is not pressed, place a we: If tofu is not pressed, place a weight on it for 15-20 minutes to press out as much as water you can.
step::Place all the ingredients into a f: Place all the ingredients into a food processor and blend it until smooth.
step::Pour into a small dish line with b: Pour into a small dish line with baking paper.
step::Cover with plastic wrap and place: Cover with plastic wrap and place in the freezer for 30 minutes. Keep in the refrigerator after this time.
step::Remove from the dish and crumble o: Remove from the dish and crumble or slice as needed. Will keep for around 3 days.
step::Blend all the ingredients in a hig: Blend all the ingredients in a high speed blender for 2 minutes or until smooth. Cool down before serving.
step::Prepare three deep containers for: Prepare three deep containers for the breading: a) Mix flour, nutritional yeast, salt and powdered nori seaweed (put seaweek papers in blender some seconds to make it powder).
step::b)Mix soya milk and nutritional ye: b)Mix soya milk and nutritional yeast.
step::c) Blend in thermomix for 15 secon: c) Blend in thermomix for 15 seconds at highest power the remaining ingredients (GF bread crumbs to cayenne pepper).
step::Cover the tofu slices in flour mix: Cover the tofu slices in flour mixture, then toss in milk mixture and afterward roll in breadcrumbs mixture.
step::In a preheated oven, bake at 200 d: In a preheated oven, bake at 200 degrees for 20-25 minutes.
step::Optional: Slices of cherry tomato: Optional: Slices of cherry tomato and fresh leafs on top before baking (thyme, sage leafs).
step::Optional: garnish with coconut bac: Optional: garnish with coconut bacon and chives (add just before serving).
step::Blend all ingredients until smooth: Blend all ingredients until smooth except tofu and fresh herbs.
Crumble the tofu. Chop the herbs. Mix all together. Serve cold.
step::Cut tofu in thin slices (approx. 5: Cut tofu in thin slices (approx. 5mm) and marinade in a container with the 0,5 L soy milk, soya sauce, olive oil and garlic powder for at least 1 hour.
step::Remove the tofu from the sauce and: Remove the tofu from the sauce and put on the tray.
step::Bake for 20 minutes at 170°C until: Bake for 20 minutes at 170°C until they get brownish.
Leave the tofu to cool down.
step::Arrange the tofu nicely on a deep: Arrange the tofu nicely on a deep tray.
step::Use the leftover marinade to make: Use the leftover marinade to make sauce for the tofu form.(Complete with the leftover the total amount of milk for the sauce) Blend all remaining ingredients and pour the sauce over the tofu.
step::Cover with aluminium foil and bake: Cover with aluminium foil and bake for another 30-40 minutes at 170°C.
step::Let linseeds and boiling water swe: Let linseeds and boiling water swell for approx. 2 hours before making the dough.
step::Let Fiber Husk and water swell app: Let Fiber Husk and water swell approx. 10 minutes (stir at once to avoid clumps).
step::Mix all the dry ingredients. Pour: Mix all the dry ingredients. Pour the oil into the seeds that are finished swelling.
step::Mix both dry and wet ingredients (: Mix both dry and wet ingredients (should feel like a thick porridge).
step::Pour into 1.5 L bread forms (use b: Pour into 1.5 L bread forms (use baking paper).
step::Leave it to set overnight for appr: Leave it to set overnight for approx 12-13 hours. Bake the next morning.
step::Bake in the preheated oven at 200: Bake in the preheated oven at 200 degrees Celsius for 15 minutes.
step::Cover with aluminum foil and conti: Cover with aluminum foil and continue baking for 1 hr and 30 mins.
step::Cut the cherry tomatoes in 4 (or s: Cut the cherry tomatoes in 4 (or small dices) and put them in a large bowl.
step::Then add the rest of the ingredien: Then add the rest of the ingredients and mix.
step::Once done, cover with plastic wrap: Once done, cover with plastic wrap and put in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour, to let the flavours incorporate in each other. After that, you should be able to notice a nice and tasty juice in the bowl together with the tomatoes.
step::Take out of the refrigerator at le: Take out of the refrigerator at least 30 min before serving.
step::In a large saucepan, sautée the ce: In a large saucepan, sautée the celery, onion and red pepper in ¼ cup of coconut milk for 5-6 minutes or until tender. Add tomatoes and tomato paste. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 40 minutes.
step::Remove from the heat. Stir in the: Remove from the heat. Stir in the basil, sugar and salt; cool slightly. Transfer half of the soup mixture to a blender. While processing, gradually add coconut milk; process until pureed. Return to the pan; heat through (do not boil).
step::Mix all ingredients in a bowl and: Mix all ingredients in a bowl and serve cold/room temperature.
step::Start by sautéeing grated beetroot: Start by sautéeing grated beetroot in a large pot with 1 tsp of olive oil and 1 tbsp of water for 10 minutes.
step::Add carrot, potato, cabbage, bulli: Add carrot, potato, cabbage, bullion, salt and water and bring to boil.
step::Cook broth for 10-15 minutes until: Cook broth for 10-15 minutes until potatoes are fork-tender.
step::While broth is cooking prepare the: While broth is cooking prepare the mirepoix and sautée onion and celery stick on a stainless steel pan with 1 tsp of oil and some water for 7-8 minutes until golden brown.
step::Add sukrin, stir fry for 30 second: Add sukrin, stir fry for 30 seconds and add to the broth.
Taste for seasoning and serve hot.
step::Bring the sauce up to a boil on me: Bring the sauce up to a boil on medium heat while stirring vith a whisk.
step::Cool down without stiring, and rem: Cool down without stiring, and remove the skin that forms on the top or blend or stir and siv.
step::Make the crust; Mix the flour, oat: Make the crust; Mix the flour, oats and salt with oil until crumbly. Add water gradually until a smooth dough forms. Press the dough into a form and prick the bottom with a fork. Pre-bake at 200 °C for about 8-10 minutes.
step::Prepare the filling; Sautéé onion: Prepare the filling; Sautéé onion and garlic in a little oil until soft and golden. Add broccoli, carrot, half of the tofu (scrambled) and soy sauce, and cook for 5–7 minutes until well mixed and heated through.
step::Make the Tofu “Custard”; Blend oth: Make the Tofu “Custard”; Blend other half of the tofu, soy milk, cornstarch, nutritional yeast, lemon juice, mustard and black salt in a blender until smooth and creamy.
step::Assemble and bake; Spread the vege: Assemble and bake; Spread the vegetable mixture evenly in the pre-baked crust. Pour the tofu custard over the vegetables and gently mix the top layer. Bake at 200 °C for 30–35 minutes, until the filling is set and the top is golden.
Blend in the vitamix until smooth.
step::Blend all the ingredients until sm: Blend all the ingredients until smooth.
step::Chop the cabbage into strips and p: Chop the cabbage into strips and put it in a bowl. Then, massage it with ¼ tsp of salt until it gets soft. Shred the carrots and mix it into the cabbage.
step::Mix the remaining ingredients in a: Mix the remaining ingredients in a high speed blender and blend it for 1-2 minutes until smooth.
step::Mix the mayonnaise into the cabbag: Mix the mayonnaise into the cabbage and carrots before serving.
step::Bring to a boil and cook until thi: Bring to a boil and cook until thick.
Wash the rice at least 2-3 times.
step::Bring to boil the water, then add: Bring to boil the water, then add the rice and salt. Let it cook around 30 -45 minutes until is sprout.
step::Once its cook drain the rest of wa: Once its cook drain the rest of water and serve.
desc::Soft, pillowy burger and sandwich: Soft, pillowy burger and sandwich buns made with gluten-free flour.
step::Make dough following bread recipe: Make dough following bread recipe with tangzhong method, mixing vigorously for 4-5 minutes until sticky but scoopable.
step::Divide dough: 110-120g for burger: Divide dough: 110-120g for burger buns or 80-90g for smaller rolls.
step::Shape with wet hands by gently cup: Shape with wet hands by gently cupping and rotating dough, smooth top without kneading, place on baking paper.
step::Cover loosely and rise 30-45 minut: Cover loosely and rise 30-45 minutes until 50-70% larger.
step::Optional: brush with oat milk and: Optional: brush with oat milk and sprinkle sesame seeds, poppy seeds, or oats.
step::Bake at 220°C for 8 minutes, then: Bake at 220°C for 8 minutes, then 190°C for 12-18 minutes until golden and hollow-sounding.
step::Cool at least 30-45 minutes before: Cool at least 30-45 minutes before slicing.
desc::Rich and creamy cashew-based cream: Rich and creamy cashew-based cream cheese with fresh herbs.
step::Soak raw cashews in water for 2-4: Soak raw cashews in water for 2-4 hours, or pour boiling water and soak 10 minutes, then drain.
step::Blend in 2-3 batches: combine cash: Blend in 2-3 batches: combine cashews, dates, lemon juice, lemon zest, salt, miso, yeast, onion powder, garlic powder, and water.
step::Blend until completely smooth and: Blend until completely smooth and creamy.
step::Add water gradually to reach thick: Add water gradually to reach thick but spreadable consistency (typically 300-500ml total).
step::Transfer to bowl and fold in finel: Transfer to bowl and fold in finely chopped chives and dill.
step::Refrigerate 2-3 hours before servi: Refrigerate 2-3 hours before serving; cream cheese will thicken and flavors will develop.
desc::Warming stew with red lentils, veg: Warming stew with red lentils, vegetables, and creamy cashew milk.
step::Saute onions, garlic, carrots, and: Saute onions, garlic, carrots, and bell pepper with splash of water over medium heat until soft and fragrant, about 5-7 minutes.
step::Add cumin, smoked paprika, turmeri: Add cumin, smoked paprika, turmeric, cinnamon, coriander, and salt, stirring 30 seconds until fragrant.
step::Stir in lentils, potatoes, crushed: Stir in lentils, potatoes, crushed tomatoes, broth, and date paste. Bring to boil.
step::Reduce heat to low, cover partiall: Reduce heat to low, cover partially, and simmer 20-25 minutes until lentils and vegetables are soft.
step::Blend cashews with water until smo: Blend cashews with water until smooth and creamy.
step::Stir cashew milk and lemon juice i: Stir cashew milk and lemon juice into stew, simmer 5 minutes to thicken.
step::Optional: use immersion blender to: Optional: use immersion blender to blend portion for creaminess while keeping some texture.
step::Taste and adjust salt, lemon, and: Taste and adjust salt, lemon, and spices as needed.
step::Serve hot garnished with cilantro,: Serve hot garnished with cilantro, alongside bread, rice, or quinoa.
desc::Soft, elastic, moist vegan gluten-: Soft, elastic, moist vegan gluten-free bread that stays fresh for days. Uses psyllium husk for structure and tangzhong method for bakery-level softness.
step::Make the tangzhong: Mix 25g oat fl: Make the tangzhong: Mix 25g oat flour (taken from the 200g) with 150ml water in a small pot. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened, about 2-3 minutes. Cool to room temperature.
step::Mix all dry ingredients in a large: Mix all dry ingredients in a large bowl: remaining 175g oat flour, rice flour, tapioca starch, psyllium husk powder, instant yeast, salt, and sugar. Whisk well to combine.
step::In another bowl, combine the coole: In another bowl, combine the cooled tangzhong, applesauce, lemon juice, and warm water (38-40°C).
step::Pour wet ingredients into dry ingr: Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and mix vigorously for 4-5 minutes until sticky but scoopable. The dough should hold together and slowly relax when shaped, not spread flat.
step::Oil a loaf tin or line with parchm: Oil a loaf tin or line with parchment paper. Transfer dough into the tin and smooth the top with a wet hand.
step::Cover loosely with plastic wrap or: Cover loosely with plastic wrap or damp cloth and let rise at room temperature for 45-60 minutes until dough rises noticeably above the tin.
step::Preheat oven to 220°C. Bake for 8-: Preheat oven to 220°C. Bake for 8-10 minutes at high heat, then reduce to 190°C and bake for 40-45 minutes more until light golden brown.
step::The bread is done when it sounds h: The bread is done when it sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom. Internal temperature should reach 96-98°C.
step::Remove from tin and cool on a wire: Remove from tin and cool on a wire rack for at least 1 hour before slicing. The crumb will continue to set as it cools.
step::Store in an airtight container; br: Store in an airtight container; bread stays soft and moist for 3-4 days or can be frozen up to 1 month.
